user.title: Connect to Sber MQTT
user.description:
Enter the credentials for connecting to the Sber MQTT broker.

A Long-Lived Access Token can be created in your HA profile: Profile → Long-Lived Access Tokens → Create Token.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the MQTT broker. Please check your credentials.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the MQTT broker.
